meta.title: Asset inventory, document vault & AI capture
meta.description: What Vaulto does today: asset inventory, a private document vault, AI-assisted capture, collections, and one clear view of everything your family owns.

hero.heading: Everything you need to know what you own.
hero.intro: A focused set of tools that do real work today. Here's what's shipped — no roadmap promises, no "coming soon" bait.

features.title: Asset inventory
features.body: Record everything you own — property, accounts, investments, valuables, pensions — with the details that matter: value or value-range, location, condition, and the people it concerns.

features.title: Document vault
features.body: Keep deeds, policies, wills, and statements safe and attached to the assets they belong to. Upload files up to 20MB, kept in private storage and reachable only through short-lived, signed links.

features.title: AI-assisted capture
features.body: Photograph an item or a document and Vaulto reads it, drafting the record for you to confirm or edit. The data entry does itself.

features.title: Collections
features.body: Group related assets and documents the way your family actually thinks about them — a property and its paperwork, an estate, a person.

features.title: The whole picture
features.body: See everything in one organised view, and get a free overview when you're ready to plan ahead — inheritance, a will, or what happens next.

features.title: Export anytime — your data is yours
features.body: Your data is yours — export a complete, machine-readable copy of your records (JSON, CSV, or PDF) at any time. No lock-in. (Bulk download of your original uploaded files is on our roadmap.)

foot: We only list what's live. When we ship something new, it shows up here — not before.

finalCta.title: See it with your own things.
finalCta.body: Get started free and add your first few assets in minutes.
